name: Diet Tofu Quiche
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
Beat 1 egg with 2 tablespoons water. Add 1/4 teaspoon dill weed, 1/2 teaspoon onion powder, and 2 tablespoons bran. Let stand for at least 10 minutes.
Pour into bottom of nonstick cake pan.
Filling:
4 ounces tofu
1 egg
3/4 cup cooked asparagus or spinach
3 tablespoons mushrooms, cooked
1 tablespoon chopped onion or granulated onion
1/4 teaspoon garlic powder
1/4 teaspoon black pepper
1/4 teaspoon Molly McButter
Blend tofu and 1 egg with enough water to make smooth.
Assemble:
Pour tofu-egg mixture into center of bran-egg mixture. Bran will be pushed to edges, forming a crust around the filling.
Place cooked mushrooms and onion in a circle on top of the filling.
Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until the filling is set and the top is browned.
